inputs.label: Sample Mean (x̄)
inputs.businessContext: Observed average of the sample data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Observed average of the sample data.

inputs.label: Null Hypothesis Mean (μ₀)
inputs.businessContext: Hypothesized population mean under the null hypothesis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hypothesized population mean under the null hypothesis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır hipotezi altında varsayılan popülasyon ortalaması.

inputs.label: Population Standard Deviation (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Known standard deviation of the population. For unknown σ, use sample standard deviation with t-test; this tool assumes normal distribution.

businessContext_i18n.en: Known standard deviation of the population. For unknown σ, use sample standard deviation with t-test; this tool assumes normal distribution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Popülasyonun bilinen standart sapması. σ bilinmiyorsa, t-testi ile örnek standart sapması kullanın; bu araç normal dağılım varsayar.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of observations in the sample.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of observations in the sample.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Beobachtungen in der Stichprobe.

inputs.label: Significance Level (α)
inputs.businessContext: Probability threshold for rejecting the null hypothesis (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability threshold for rejecting the null hypothesis (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır hipotezini reddetmek için olasılık eşiği (örneğin %5 için 0,05).

inputs.label: Tail Type
inputs.businessContext: 1 for one-tailed test, 2 for two-tailed test.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 for one-tailed test, 2 for two-tailed test.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek kuyruklu test için 1, çift kuyruklu test için 2.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
